ui-card.description: Use for presenting products, services, tariffs, or plans. ALWAYS include title and price attributes.

attributes.title: The name of the service or product
attributes.price: The cost of the service/product (e.g. Free, $10, 1500 руб.)

ui-card.children: Detailed description of the product or service.

ui-button.description: Use for quick actions or suggested queries. Clicking this will automatically search for the button's text.
ui-button.children: Text of the button/action (e.g. Learn more, Book now, Записаться).

ui-link.description: Use for all external links (e.g. WhatsApp, Telegram, Website, Maps, Socials).
ui-link.children: Label for the link (e.g. WhatsApp, Telegram, Open Map).

ui-image.description: Use to display images of products, interiors, offices, certificates, or team members.

attributes.src: The direct URL to the image

ui-badge.description: Use to highlight states, features, or promotions.
ui-badge.children: Text inside the badge (e.g. NEW, HOT, Sale, 10% OFF).

ui-accordion.description: Use for expandable content or details (collapsible details box). Good for technical parameters or long FAQ sub-sections.

attributes.title: The header text of the collapsible section

ui-accordion.children: The content hidden inside the collapsible block (opens on click).
